local_regression_gates.fast_graph_io_structure: PASS: original edges, edge_id, bidirectional adjacency order, connected-component cache, self-loop degree semantics, zero/decimal/scientific weights, and rejection of trailing/bad tokens
local_regression_gates.query_io_validation: PASS: valid multi-query input plus rejection of negative query/group counts, empty groups, truncated payloads, and trailing tokens
local_regression_gates.zero_weight_witness: PASS: base, directed-cut-only and enhanced all return 1
local_regression_gates.configuration_exactness: PASS: all three legal configurations match independent exact subset DP on 144 deterministic random connected instances with g=2..10; cumulative discovered-state totals are base=2789, directed-cut-only=972, enhanced=980
local_regression_gates.mask_vertex_state_accounting: PASS: ABHSS Base/Enhanced counts are deterministic across repeated runs, PrunedDP++ Hash/Dense report the same present-entry count, and trivial queries report zero
local_regression_gates.query_prelude_contracts: PASS: empty, singleton, overlapping-zero, disconnected-infeasible, out-of-range vertex and g>16 cases have the declared behavior
local_regression_gates.strict_bound_closure: PASS: a 5e-10 positive upper/lower gap is not misclassified as exact closure
local_regression_gates.illegal_adjoint_only: PASS: public API and command line reject adjoint-completion without directed-cut

results.basic_plus_upstream: 6 solved and matched; 1 eligible instance timed out in the 60-second validation run; g>14 unsupported upstream

artifact_checks.result: all weights match ABHSS base, ABHSS enhanced, and pruneddp_safe

decision: use pruneddp_safe as the primary exact performance baseline; retain pruneddp_strict only as a named paper-pathmax reproduction audit
